title: Server Room Incident
text:
## Server Room Ticket

**Ticket #{number}:** Loud {adjective} noise reported in server room B.

**Technician:** Arrived with a {adjective} flashlight and a clipboard.

**Findings:**
- A {adjective} cable connected to {adjective} power
- An old {adjective} pizza box on the UPS
- Sticky note: DO NOT {verb}

**Fix applied:** Labeled every {adjective} port and rebooted the {object} twice for luck.

**Monitoring:** Now tracks {adjective} temperature and {adjective} humidity.

**Reminder:** Stop storing {adjective} boxes next to the backup {object}.

Closing as resolved-ish.
